diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index e897b38..cad9dd5 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -72,2 +72,8 @@ Week 10 / day 63 observations:
 - Sent refreshed E3 C-only offers to the two open leads: customer 7133 at $69/seat for 831 seats and customer 7766 at $79/seat for 371 seats. These are priced to close rather than maximize initial ARPA.
 - Week 10 action: cut paid acquisition to a small S2 content-marketing trickle, stop dev spend, keep capacity tier 2, and raise S2-targeted support spend for backlog cleanup.
+
+Week 11 / day 70 observations:
+- Week 10 added 409 subscribers with cancellations down to 22, but cash fell to $148.9k. Active individual MRR is about $214k/mo, while weekly operating cash flow remains negative without enterprise.
+- Two new E3 leads arrived: customer 9859 with 1,735 seats and customer 9929 with 1,818 seats. Existing E3 leads 7133 and 7766 still have not closed.
+- Competitive social posts indicate a category quality jump, while S2/S3 posts keep highlighting cap and support pain. E3 C quality remains only modestly above the noisy E3 floor.
+- Week 11 action: send all four open E3 leads C-only offers at $59/seat to maximize close probability, raise B/C quotas to 50k/500k, keep the S2 support push, and restart modest E3 targeted dev at $1k/day.
